query_normalized: assessing parcellation sensitivity of hub resilience in healthy connectomes neuroscience
rationale: The paper focuses on using connectomes as biomarkers for brain disease and discusses variability within healthy subjects as a confounding factor, but it does not measure or analyze "hub resilience," "parcellation sensitivity," or the specific mechanism of how network topology changes with different brain parcellations. It fails to satisfy criteria (a) or (b) because it lacks the specific variables (resilience, parcellation sensitivity) and does not provide the foundational methodology (d) or emp
